start_urls_note: Single archive page lists all ~700 articles across volumes (no pagination). PDFs live on individual article detail pages under /YYYY/MM/DD/<slug>/, with the actual file at /wp-content/uploads/YYYY/MM/<file>.pdf.

metadata.status_reason: re-onboard with full selectors and start_urls; legacy seed (southern_california_law_review.json) had only metadata, no selectors

navigation.volume_url_pattern: none (no per-volume landing page; volume encoded in article post class as `volume-volume-{N}` / `volumeandissue-vol-{N}-no-{M}`)
navigation.archive_path: homepage -> /archive/ -> ~700 article links rendered by Elementor posts widget -> article detail page -> PDF at /wp-content/uploads/YYYY/MM/*.pdf
navigation.total_volumes_estimated: Vol 92 -> Vol 99 visible (oldest confirmed Vol 92, 2018; newest Vol 99, 2025-2026)
navigation.notes: Built on WordPress + Elementor. Article cards use class `elementor-post elementor-grid-item` with title in `h3.elementor-post__title > a`. PDF link on detail page is the first internal `a[href$='.pdf']` under /wp-content/uploads/. Sister Postscript section already covered by southerncalifornialawreview-postscript.json. Volume/issue can be parsed from container class names (`volume-volume-N`, `volumeandissue-vol-N-no-M`) if adapter supports it; otherwise needs PDF-first-page metadata pass. Smoke test 2026-05-02 PASS: PDF downloaded via WordPressAcademicBaseAdapter; per-article title not captured by adapter (uses archive page `<title>`), volume/issue not captured — needs tighter selectors or PDF-first-page metadata pass; year and authors captured correctly.
